case_number: misconceived is dismissed accordingly with no order

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.418 of 2024 (Muhammad Ibrahim v. Province of Sindh and others) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF THE JUDGE For orders on maintainability 30.04.2024 Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, advocate for the petitioner Syed Aly Maqbool, Addl. Advocate General Sindh Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, Asstt. PG for the State ------------------------- It is stated by the petitioner that the private respondents are harassing him to be ejected from the house in his possession. By stating so, he has sought protection from such harassment from this Court by way of an instant petition. The issue of possession or dispossession of the petitioner from the house in his occupancy involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in the exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction under the deception of protection. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly with no order as cost. J U D G E Nadir*
